name: Voice Ingress
description: Receives transcript payloads from website voice widget, normalizes event contract, and routes to Voice Agent.

parameters.jsCode:
const event = {
  channel: 'website_voice',
  session_id: $json.session_id,
  message_id: `voice-${$json.session_id}-${Date.now()}`,
  direction: 'inbound',
  event_ts: $json.timestamp,
  source_label: 'website_voice',
  source_page: $json.source_page,
  page_url: $json.page_url,
  referrer_url: $json.referrer_url,
  utm_source: $json.utm_source,
  utm_medium: $json.utm_medium,
  utm_campaign: $json.utm_campaign,
  utm_term: $json.utm_term,
  utm_content: $json.utm_content,
  content: $json.transcript,
  language: $json.language,
  source_channel_confidence: 0.95,
  _metadata: {
    provider: $json.provider,
    vapi: {
      assistant_id: $json.vapi?.assistant_id || null,
      public_key: $json.vapi?.public_key || null,
      system_prompt: $json.vapi?.system_prompt || null,
      tools: Array.isArray($json.vapi?.tools) ? $json.vapi.tools : []
    },
    transcription_provider: 'browser-speech-api',
    transcription_confidence: 0.95,
    detected_language: $json.language
  }
};
return [{ json: event }];

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.data || $json.body || $json.response || $json.output || $json.text || ''; if (raw && typeof raw === 'object') { return raw.response || raw.output || raw.text || JSON.stringify(raw); } if (typeof raw === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return parsed.response || parsed.output || parsed.text || raw; } catch (error) { return raw; } } return ''; })() }}
